semantics.engine: realize(rootDegree, from): 5-voice generalized tertian stack. Voice i targets pc (rootMidi + degrees[(rootDegree + 2i) mod card]) mod 12. Each voice moves independently from from[i] (or baseVoicing[i] when from is null) to the nearest octave placement of its target pc within ±11 semitones (ties resolved downward: strict < comparison scanning upward), then clamps to [48, 85], then the voicing is sorted ascending. Doubling is permitted; voices are a multiset.
semantics.maskConvention: modeMaskRootRelative: bit n = root + n semitones (bit 0 always set). modeMaskAbsolute = rotate_mask(modeMaskRootRelative, 9) per the documented contract (root A).
semantics.greedyCost: Sum over voices of pre-clamp |displacement| in from-voice order — the engine's internal scoring quantity. NOT a metric on the resulting voicing pair: clamping is applied after costing, so a clamped case's realized pair can disagree with this number.
semantics.sortedDisplacement: Σ|from_sorted[i] − realized_sorted[i]| over the sorted 5-tuples (null for opening chords). For equal-cardinality voicings this is the optimal non-crossing pairing distance — the expected voice_leading_realized value.

cases.provenance: synthetic: opening chord, no previous voicing (engine default base)
synthetic: chromatic cluster mode, max-displacement target
synthetic: chromatic cluster from wide voicing
synthetic: quench re-realization: pentatonic voicing into mutated card-6 mode, degree 0
synthetic: quench re-realization: leading-tone swap, degree 0
